post_text:
🚀 ChatGPT just hit 900 MILLION weekly users.

That's 350% growth in 18 months. They're within striking distance of 1 billion.

Here's what our latest AI Search Report reveals:

📊 THE NUMBERS:
• 900M ChatGPT weekly active users (up from 858M)
• 50M paying subscribers
• 18.5% of all digital queries now go to AI
• Google's search share: 76.1% (all-time low)
• AI Overviews in 68% of US searches

💰 THE MONEY:
• Anthropic raised $30B at $380B valuation
• Anthropic ARR: $14B (Claude Code alone: $2.5B)
• OpenAI ARR: $20B, targeting $280B by 2030

📱 THE SURPRISE:
Claude hit #1 on the App Store after Anthropic took a principled stance on a Pentagon contract. Users are voting with their wallets.

What this means for marketers:

The "search" landscape isn't fragmenting — it's transforming. Every month, more queries bypass Google entirely. Every month, AI Overviews consume more of the SERP.

If your visibility strategy is still "rank on Google," you're optimizing for a shrinking pie.

→ Full interactive report with all the data: https://aisearch.simpletiger.com

---
#AISearch #ChatGPT #SEO #DigitalMarketing #SearchMarketing #AI #OpenAI #Anthropic #GEO
